title: Oil prices Iran ceasefire Strait Hormuz energy costs — CNBC follow-up on monthly decline
snippet: CNBC follow-up report on oil price declines driven by Iran ceasefire expectations and anticipated Hormuz reopening. Confirms ceasefire deal optimism as primary driver of May's historic price drop.
tag_reason: Update on oil price data from src-1461; full month-end figures now available confirming -19% monthly drop
